title: Global rank
subtitle: One ranking, across all divisions, weighted by division and the last 2 seasons.
loadError: Couldn't load the global rank. Please try again.
newBadgeTooltip: No previous global rank measurement yet — shown after the next refresh.
movementUpTooltip: Up {n} place(s) since the last refresh
movementDownTooltip: Down {n} place(s) since the last refresh
legendFormula: Score = division-weighted points, averaged over the seasons you've played (last 2 seasons count; current season counts double the previous one).
